title: calliandra haematostoma var. genuina
intro: Calliandra haematostoma var. genuina, also known as the Red Powder Puff, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits such as wound healing, immune system support, and protection against infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Calliandra haematostoma var. genuina is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used topically as a paste or poultice to aid in wound healing.
